# Build with Ekstra - LLM demo context
# Canonical GitHub source: https://github.com/imxdemetri/build-with-ekstra/blob/main/llms.txt
# Raw source for agents: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/imxdemetri/build-with-ekstra/main/llms.txt
# Last verified: 2026-05-18

## Purpose

This is the compact AI-agent entrypoint for the public Build with Ekstra
starter repo. It is intended for demos where a user drops this file into a
coding agent and says: "Build something with this, and show me a demo."

Use this file to build a small, working Ekstra demo. For complete API details,
use the live developer context pack:

- https://ekstra.ai/llms-full.txt
- https://ekstra.ai/downloads/ekstra-vibe-coder-guide.json
- https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/openapi.json

## What Ekstra Is

Ekstra is a motion, presence, and physical-intelligence platform. It gives
developers two practical build lanes:

1. Data apps: consume public Ekstra signals through REST APIs.
2. Motion apps: use phones, cameras, or other devices as motion/control inputs.

Raw camera video is not the first demo path. Prefer public data reads,
browser-local motion, phone IMU, signed Motion Packets, and visible proofs.

## Personalized Demo Contract

When asked to build a demo:

1. Use only visible conversation context, files the user shared, repo context,
   and preferences the user explicitly provided.
2. If prior assistant memory exists, use only relevant high-level preferences
   that can be explained back to the user.
3. Never invent hidden personal history, sensitive personal details, or claims
   that are not grounded in the current context.
4. Ask at most two questions if context is thin; otherwise choose a tasteful
   default and build.
5. Choose one lane: Data, Motion, or Hybrid.
6. Ship a visible one-screen proof with run steps.
7. Include a short personalization capsule: assumptions used, why they fit,
   and how the user can retarget the demo.
8. Do not require wallet connection, XTRA, raw camera upload, or developer
   login for the first local proof unless the requested feature specifically
   needs it.

Recommended prompt:

```text
Use this Build with Ekstra llms.txt as your source of truth. Build me a small
working Ekstra demo and show me how to run it. Personalize the idea using only
what you know from this conversation or what I explicitly tell you. Ask at most
two questions if needed; otherwise make a tasteful default.
```

## Verified Live API And Runtime Contract

The following endpoints were smoke-tested and should be treated as the public
demo contract. A protected endpoint returning `401` without credentials is live
and healthy; it is enforcing auth.

### Machine-readable context

- `GET https://ekstra.ai/llms.txt` -> `200 text/plain`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/llms-full.txt` -> `200 text/plain`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/downloads/ekstra-vibe-coder-guide.json` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/openapi.json` -> `200 application/json`

### Public data APIs

- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/network/devices?limit=1` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/network/stats` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/platform/facts` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/curb-rules/near?lat=40.7580&lng=-73.9855&radius_m=200` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/curb-rules/stats` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/spaces/near?lat=40.7580&lng=-73.9855&radius_m=200` -> `200 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/cameras?limit=1` -> `200 application/json`

### Developer control plane

- `POST https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/login` with invalid/missing email -> JSON error response
- `POST https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/verify` with invalid/missing code -> JSON error response
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/overview` without bearer token -> `401 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/projects` without bearer token -> `401 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/api-keys` without bearer token -> `401 application/json`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/packages` without bearer token -> `401 application/json`

Use the real login flow only when the user intends to authenticate:

```bash
curl -X POST https://ekstra.ai/api/developer/cloud/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"you@example.com"}'
```

### Motion runtime and hosted sandbox

- `GET https://ekstra.ai/api/phone-imu/health` -> `200 application/json`
- `POST https://ekstra.ai/api/phone-imu/ingest` with `{}` -> `200 application/json` and `received:false`
- `POST https://ekstra.ai/api/v1/runtime/packets/ingest` without auth -> `401 application/json`
- `wss://ekstra.ai/ws` -> WebSocket handshake opens

### Build with Ekstra hosted surfaces

- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/demo` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/presentation-remote` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/controller` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/presentation-controller` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/qr?data=https%3A%2F%2Fekstra.ai%2Fbuild-with-ekstra%2Fcontroller` -> `200 image/png`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/demo` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/OS?from=build` -> `200 text/html`
- `GET https://ekstra.ai/status` -> `200 text/html`

## Good First Demos

### Data demo

Build a parking, curb, or camera-map page using public REST endpoints. Start
with `curb-rules/near`, `network/stats`, or `cameras?limit=1`.

### Motion demo

Build a browser experience controlled by a phone. Start with:

- https://ekstra.ai/build-with-ekstra/demo
- `starters/web-phone-pointer`
- `starters/presentation-remote`
- `wss://ekstra.ai/ws`
- `https://ekstra.ai/api/phone-imu/ingest`

### Hybrid demo

Combine a live data view with a motion-controlled interaction: a map that can
be panned by phone tilt, a kiosk-style stats board, a presentation remote for
live network metrics, or a one-screen city signal dashboard.

## Output Expected From An Agent

- Demo concept in one paragraph
- Chosen lane: Data, Motion, or Hybrid
- Working app code or patch
- Run instructions
- Personalization capsule
- Honest constraints if a route is protected, degraded, or requires auth
